name: NextClaw Skin Studio
summary: Apply 11 source-aligned skins or author unrestricted personal NextClaw skins.

summaryI18n.en: Apply 11 source-aligned skins or author unrestricted personal NextClaw skins.
summaryI18n.zh: 应用 11 款原仓库皮肤，或创作可任意植入 CSS、JavaScript 和视觉效果的个人皮肤。

description: Browse and apply 11 recognizable Codex Dream Skin looks, or create a durable personal skin project outside the installed Skill. Personal projects can use arbitrary CSS and unsandboxed same-origin JavaScript, standard DOM APIs, SVG, local imagery, custom layout, and motion to change any visible NextClaw surface; there is no Skin Studio JavaScript API or component allowlist. Applying a bundled look downloads only its pinned upstream image, verifies SHA-256, and embeds it locally; bundled looks execute no remote code. Personal JavaScript has full page access and is entirely the user's security, reliability, and compatibility responsibility. Portrait and character imagery remains third-party material outside the upstream MIT software license.

descriptionI18n.en: Browse and apply 11 recognizable Codex Dream Skin looks, or create a durable personal skin project outside the installed Skill. Personal projects can use arbitrary CSS and unsandboxed same-origin JavaScript, standard DOM APIs, SVG, local imagery, custom layout, and motion to change any visible NextClaw surface; there is no Skin Studio JavaScript API or component allowlist. Applying a bundled look downloads only its pinned upstream image, verifies SHA-256, and embeds it locally; bundled looks execute no remote code. Personal JavaScript has full page access and is entirely the user's security, reliability, and compatibility responsibility. Portrait and character imagery remains third-party material outside the upstream MIT software license.
descriptionI18n.zh: 可浏览并应用 11 款高辨识度 Codex Dream Skin 皮肤，也可以在已安装 Skill 之外创建长期保存的个人皮肤工程。个人工程可以直接编写任意 CSS 和不受沙箱限制的同源 JavaScript，使用标准 DOM API、SVG、本地图片、自定义布局与动效，修改 NextClaw 中任何看得见的区域；Skin Studio 不提供 JavaScript API，也不设置组件白名单。应用内置皮肤时只下载固定上游版本的图片、校验 SHA-256 并嵌入本地，不执行远程代码。个人 JavaScript 拥有完整页面权限，其安全性、可靠性和版本兼容风险由用户自行承担；人物与角色图片仍是 MIT 软件许可之外的第三方素材。

author: NextClaw
